module_sme_rollup.name: Communication & Collaboration
module_sme_rollup.description: Unified messaging, email, and real-time team coordination across all channels.

statements.text: Connect Gmail and Outlook; attach emails to customers, orders, projects with full history.
Enable team email assignment, tagging, and bulk messaging for shared inbox management.
Organize conversations by department, project, or topic with threaded replies and @mentions.
Display real-time activity feed showing record changes, approvals, and linked ERP comments.
Sync calendars with Google, Outlook, Apple iCal; check real-time availability for meetings.
Book rooms, equipment, vehicles; send appointment reminders via email, SMS, push.

module_sme_rollup.name: Process Automation & Governance
module_sme_rollup.description: Workflow approval chains, audit trails, and compliance controls with minimal manual intervention.

statements.text: Configure sequential, parallel, conditional approval routing by role and transaction amount.
Auto-escalate pending approvals after timeout; delegate to substitute approvers when absent.
Record immutable audit trail of all create, update, delete operations with user and timestamp.
Define alert rules by event, threshold, or condition; send via email, SMS, in-app, push.
Allow users to select notification channels, configure quiet hours, consolidate into digests.
statements.rationale: User control and alert fatigue reduction

statements.text: Track compliance status against PDPA, Cyber Essentials, SOC 2; generate audit reports on demand.

module_sme_rollup.name: Knowledge & Content Management
module_sme_rollup.description: Centralized repository for documents, knowledge articles, and business information with access controls.

statements.text: Upload, store, organize documents linked to any ERP record with folder, tag, category structure.
Track document changes with user, modification type, timestamp; restrict access by folder or document.
Search document contents by keyword, concept, Boolean logic; preview PDF, images, office files.
Build rich-text knowledge base with hierarchical categories, tags, full-text search, version history.
Restrict knowledge base visibility at section and article level; support user favorites and pinned articles.
Create dynamic document templates for automated assembly; set retention periods and legal hold.

module_sme_rollup.name: Data Integration & Insights
module_sme_rollup.description: Real-time dashboards, AI-powered analytics, and seamless data flow across systems.

statements.text: Aggregate data from all ERP modules into unified cross-functional dashboards with interactive filtering.
Provide standard chart types, KPI cards, heatmaps; enable drill-down to underlying transaction detail.
Schedule automated report generation and email delivery at daily, weekly, monthly intervals.
Natural-language search retrieves ERP records; AI generates summaries of customer, project, transaction data.
Anomaly detection flags unusual transactions and suspicious patterns; chatbot answers self-service questions.
statements.rationale: Risk detection and user support automation

statements.text: RESTful API with OAuth 2.0, webhooks, bulk import/export; pre-built connectors for e-commerce and HRMS.

module_sme_rollup.name: Security, Access & Compliance
module_sme_rollup.description: Multi-factor authentication, encryption, role-based access, and data privacy controls.

statements.text: Enforce multi-factor authentication for all user logins; support single sign-on via Google or Microsoft.
Create user accounts, assign roles, restrict data visibility by role at document level.
Encrypt personal data at rest and in transit; maintain audit trail of all data access and deletion.
Capture consent decisions with timestamp; implement automatic data retention and expiry-based deletion.
Perform automated daily backups with point-in-time recovery; store backups separately and encrypted.
Hold ISO 27001 or Cyber Essentials certification; conduct annual third-party security assessments.

module_sme_rollup.name: Customization & Operations
module_sme_rollup.description: Low-code configuration, multi-language support, and operational tools for business continuity.

statements.text: Create custom fields, if-then rules, lookup values, forms, reports without code deployment.
Build custom document templates with dynamic field insertion; customize print templates for invoices, labels.
Generate barcodes and QR codes; batch print documents; support thermal printers for labels.
Switch UI language between English and Mandarin; format dates, numbers, currency by locale.
Operate multiple legal entities from one instance; maintain separate books and consolidated reporting.
Maintain single authoritative master record per customer, product, vendor; enforce validation rules.
Provide guided tours, searchable help articles, video tutorials, and customizable training content.

Platform & Data.narrative: This family ensures your ERP data is always safe, accessible from any device, and compliant with Singapore's data protection laws. SMEs depend on this to keep operations running even during outages, serve customers in multiple languages, and protect sensitive business information from breaches. A retail chain needs mobile access for staff on the shop floor, while a distributor must back up inventory data to survive a server failure.

Productivity & Collaboration.narrative: These capabilities connect your team's conversations, schedules, and knowledge in one place so information doesn't get lost in email threads or spreadsheets. SMEs benefit by reducing miscommunication, speeding up decision-making, and building institutional memory that survives staff turnover. A service company uses shared calendars to avoid double-booking technicians, while a growing firm documents SOPs in a wiki so new hires onboard faster.

Workflow & Automation.narrative: This family automates repetitive approval steps, alerts the right person at the right time, and keeps all documents in one searchable place—eliminating manual chasing and lost paperwork. SMEs save time and reduce errors by routing purchase orders, leave requests, or customer feedback through defined workflows without IT involvement. A manufacturing firm uses approval workflows to enforce budget controls, while a services company automates customer feedback collection via custom forms.

Intelligence & Analytics.narrative: These tools turn raw ERP data into visual dashboards, AI-powered insights, and compliance records so you can spot trends, make faster decisions, and prove you're following the rules. SMEs use this to answer questions like 'Which products are selling?' or 'Are we on track to hit targets?' without waiting for IT reports. A food distributor tracks expiry dates and stock levels on a live dashboard, while a recruiter uses AI to summarize candidate feedback.

Customisation & Integration.narrative: This family lets you tailor the ERP to your unique business without hiring developers, connect it to your existing tools, and manage multiple offices or brands from one system. SMEs need this flexibility to stay competitive—whether adding custom fields for your industry, linking to your accounting software, or scaling to a second branch. A logistics company integrates its ERP with a shipping API to auto-generate labels, while a multi-brand retailer runs separate P&Ls for each brand in one instance.
